title: Can Iran Keep Its Edge?
summary_full: Closing the Strait of Hormuz was a huge source of leverage during the war. But playing the same card over and over is risky.
summary_public: Closing the Strait of Hormuz was a huge source of leverage during the war. But playing the same card over and over is risky.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Closing the Strait of Hormuz was a huge source of leverage
